creator: crow@localhost.hu
text:
When i type any command in mc's commandline, Followed by C-o, then mc
can't return from the background subshell.

Fix: 

no idea about fix.
How-To-Repeat: 	1)start mc.
	2)run a command into mc's commandlinke 
	3)Ctrl-o
	4)type Ctrl-o again, do nothing. Here the mc should return into forground.
